scripts.test:bulk-approval-flow: npm run test:seed:bulk && cypress run --spec "cypress/regression/BulkPaymentApproval.cy.ts" --headed --browser chrome
scripts.test:bulk-approval-flow-headless: npm run test:seed:bulk && cypress run --spec "cypress/regression/BulkPaymentApproval.cy.ts" --browser chrome
scripts.test:approval-flow: npm run test:seed && cypress run --spec "cypress/regression/ApprovalFlow.cy.ts" --headed --browser chrome
scripts.test:approval-flow-headless: npm run test:seed && cypress run --spec "cypress/regression/ApprovalFlow.cy.ts" --browser chrome
